org.sterl.spring.persistent_tasks.api.CronTriggerBuilder

Package
Description
org.sterl.spring.persistent_tasks.api
 

  • Uses of CronTriggerBuilder in org.sterl.spring.persistent_tasks.api

    Methods in org.sterl.spring.persistent_tasks.api that return CronTriggerBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CronTriggerBuilder<T>
    CronTriggerBuilder.after(Duration interval)
    Sets the schedule using a fixed interval after each invocation.
    CronTriggerBuilder<T>
    CronTriggerBuilder.cron(String cronExpression)
    Sets the schedule using a cron expression.
    CronTriggerBuilder<T>
    CronTriggerBuilder.id(String id)
    Sets the unique ID for this scheduled trigger.
    CronTriggerBuilder<T>
    TaskId.newCron()
     
    CronTriggerBuilder<T>
    CronTriggerBuilder.priority(int priority)
    Sets the priority for created triggers (higher = more important).
    CronTriggerBuilder<T>
    CronTriggerBuilder.state(T state)
    Sets a fixed state for all trigger executions.
    CronTriggerBuilder<T>
    CronTriggerBuilder.stateProvider(Supplier<T> stateProvider)
    Sets a state provider that's called for each trigger execution.
    CronTriggerBuilder<T>
    CronTriggerBuilder.tag(String tag)
    Sets a custom tag for created triggers.
